title: Week 2 Day 1 (1/2) — Many providers
summary: Part 1 of 2 · Multi-vendor `.env` · reasoning · OpenRouter · model comparison.

sections.heading: Today's goal
sections.remember: Use **many frontier providers** from one codebase — compare models, try **reasoning**, intro **OpenRouter** and **LiteLLM**.

sections.heading: Multi-provider setup
sections.remember: Separate keys in `.env` — each vendor gets `OpenAI(api_key=..., base_url=...)`.
points: OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Groq, Grok, OpenRouter — skip what you don't configure.

sections.heading: Reasoning models
sections.remember: GPT-5 family: pass **`reasoning_effort`** (`minimal`, `low`, …) — model spends compute on internal reasoning tokens.
points: Different from plain chat — tuned for harder puzzles/planning.
Compare same prompt across GPT, Claude, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, Grok in lab.

sections.heading: Ollama & native SDKs
sections.remember: Local **`llama3.2`** still available · optional large **`gpt-oss`** if 16GB+ RAM · or use **`anthropic.Anthropic`** / **`google.genai`** natively.
points: Compatible API is enough for most apps — native SDKs when you need vendor-specific features.

sections.heading: OpenRouter
points: Good for bake-offs and accessing models without separate integrations.

cheatSheet: One OpenAI client class per base_url
